description: AeroAPI is a simple, query-based API that gives software developers access to a variety of FlightAware's flight data.

novel_features.name: Google Flights Search
novel_features.description: Query Google Flights via a native Go backend (utls TLS-fingerprint evasion + protobuf RPC parsing, internal/gflights) — real prices, durations, airlines, legs. No API key.

novel_features.name: Soar / Duffel Search
novel_features.description: Search Soar (flysoar.ai) Duffel-backed airfare with GUI-parity filters and hand-off to Soar's booking agent (internal/soar).

novel_features.name: Multi-city Itineraries
novel_features.description: Compose and price multi-segment (open-jaw / multi-city) Google Flights itineraries.

novel_features.name: Delay Assessment
novel_features.description: Decision-support assessment of a flight's on-time reliability and delay risk from historical + live signals.

novel_features.name: Non-Obvious Insight Digest
novel_features.description: Domain-archetype insight digest surfacing non-obvious routing/pricing observations across sources.
